canonical_definition: The process of removing or compressing visual tokens from an image representation in a vision-language model to reduce computational load while preserving task-relevant information.
papers: Measuring Chain of Thought Faithfulness by Unlearning Reasoning Steps
UniversalCEFR: Enabling Open Multilingual Research on Language Proficiency Assessment

definitions.text: The process of removing or compressing visual tokens from an image representation in a vision-language model to reduce computational load while preserving task-relevant information.
definitions.paper: UniversalCEFR: Enabling Open Multilingual Research on Language Proficiency Assessment

definitions.text: Compressing visual tokens into fewer representations before they are passed to the language model.
definitions.paper: UniversalCEFR: Enabling Open Multilingual Research on Language Proficiency Assessment

definitions.text: The process of reducing the number of vision tokens in the input sequence to improve inference efficiency while preserving performance.
definitions.paper: Measuring Chain of Thought Faithfulness by Unlearning Reasoning Steps
